response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically solid full-stack engineer with roughly 17 years of professional experience and genuine entrepreneurial exposure through GISCollective, but the resume does not demonstrate the depth of AI expertise, strategic advisory experience, or thought leadership that a director-level Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role demands. His AI work is recent and scoped to agentic tooling at his current employer (since April 2025), with no prior history of building recognized AI products or platforms at scale. There is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on cloud/AI adoption, and the overall profile reads as a senior hands-on individual contributor rather than a director-level technical strategist.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career spanning web, mobile, embedded, high-throughput data systems, and cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), demonstrating broad technical range
Entrepreneurial experience founding and sustaining GISCollective as a real-world open-source geo-data platform deployed for NGOs, showing product ownership beyond employment
Active engagement with emerging AI tooling in current role — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — indicating current awareness of the AI ecosystem
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and concentrated entirely in the last two months of employment history; no demonstrated track record of building AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No evidence of director-level scope: strategic customer advisory, cross-org AI strategy influence, or external recognition as an AI thought leader (publications, keynotes, industry visibility)
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and the technical background, while broad, skews toward application development rather than ML infrastructure, modeling, or AI platform architecture

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
Absence of strategic advisory or thought leadership evidence
Breadth of engineering experience and entrepreneurial background
